data.title: Bitcoin Could Crash Significantly If It Fails to Hold Critical Support
data.description:
A well-known crypto analyst has raised concerns about Bitcoin’s stability, warning that a major drop could be on the horizon if the asset fails to maintain a crucial support level.
The post Bitcoin Could Crash Significantly If It Fails to Hold Critical Support appeared first on Cryptodnes.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/bitcoin-could-crash-significantly-if-it-fails-to-hold-critical-support/

data.title: Binance will launch BERA leveraged trading, perpetual contracts and simple earning
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch leveraged trading of BERA/USDT and BERA/USDC at 4:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, and USDⓈ-MBERA perpetual contract at 3:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 75 times. In addition, BERA will be launched on Binance Simple Earn Coin at 1:00 pm (UTC) on February 6, 2025, and users can start subscribing. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: The market value of the meme token TST mentioned by CZ has reached 20 million US dollars
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN data shows that the market value of the Meme token TST mentioned by CZ has reached 20 million US dollars, and is currently reported at 18.3 million US dollars. 
Earlier, CZ posted on the X platform: "Previously, an educational video for meme tokens was launched. In this video, the token named TST was launched as an example. Then the token appeared in the community. After learning about this, the team members deleted the video. But the Internet will not forget. CZ said that it is recommended to put the video tutorial back, but it does not represent his recognition of the token. The team member also deleted the private key of the creator address used in the tutorial, which holds 0.13% of the tokens. No one in the team (or Binance) holds the token. TST is not the official token of the BNB Chain team or anyone. It is just a test token for the video tutorial. That's all." 
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: 900,000 $OM transferred to Amber Group: Binance Deposit marked address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that on-chain data showed that 900,000 $OM were transferred from an address starting with 0x1A52 to the Amber Group: Binance Deposit marked address, with a value of approximately US$5.3 million.

data.title: Telegram Mandates Use Of TON Connect For Third-Party Wallets
data.description: According to Odaily, Telegram has announced that third-party crypto wallets must now utilize TON Connect and has restricted mini-programs to the TON blockchain. This decision has sparked concerns within the crypto community regarding decentralization and exclusivity. TON Connect serves as a communication protocol between wallets and applications within the TON ecosystem. This new requirement is part of Telegram's collaboration with the TON Foundation, making TON the sole blockchain network supported by its communication service. A spokesperson from the TON Foundation stated that wallets within Telegram remain unaffected as they are based on TON and only support TON Connect for decentralized application interactions. However, third-party wallets that do not adopt TON Connect will no longer be supported in the future.

data.title: CZ: TST is not an official BNB Chain token and is only used for video tutorials
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CZ posted on the X platform: "Previously, an educational video about a meme token was launched. In this video, the token called TST was launched as an example. The token then appeared in the community, and the team members deleted the video after learning about it. But the Internet will not forget. CZ said that it is recommended to put the video tutorial back, but it does not endorse the token. The team member also deleted the private key of the creator address used in the tutorial, which holds 0.13% of the tokens, and no one in the team (or Binance) holds the token. TST is not the official token of the BNB Chain team or anyone, it is just a test token used for the video tutorial. That's all."

data.title: Prediction Market Foresees 46% Chance of US Establishing Bitcoin Reserve by 2025
data.description: As per a recent analysis by TechFlow, the prediction market platform Polymarket indicates a 46% probability that the United States will establish a national Bitcoin reserve by the end of 2025. This insight emerges from trading patterns on the platform, where the specific prediction contract has amassed a trading volume of $696,300. The market's speculation highlights the growing interest and debate surrounding the integration of cryptocurrencies into national financial strategies, reflecting a significant shift in how digital assets are perceived at governmental levels.

data.title: Telegram requires third-party crypto wallets to use TON Connect
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Telegram now requires third-party crypto wallets to use TON Connect and restricts mini-programs to the TON blockchain, sparking concerns in the crypto community about decentralization and exclusivity. It is reported that TON Connect is the communication protocol between wallets and applications under the TON ecosystem. The new requirements are part of Telegram's cooperation with the TON Foundation, making TON the only blockchain network supported by its communication services. A spokesperson for the TON Foundation said: "Wallets in Telegram are not affected because they are based on TON and only support TON Connect for decentralized application interactions, but third-party wallets that do not adopt TON Connect will no longer be supported in the future." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bank of England cuts interest rates by 25 basis points
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Bank of England cut interest rates by 25 basis points, lowering the benchmark interest rate from 4.75% to 4.5%, in line with market expectations. This is the third rate cut in this round of rate cuts. After the news was released, the GBP/USD exchange rate fell 60 points in the short term and is now at 1.2365. The Bank of England said that the interest rate decision was passed by a vote of 7-2. (The last meeting was 6-3). ((Jinshi)

data.title: CoinShares: Ethereum has seen $740 million in inflows this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Butterfill, head of research at CoinShares, wrote on the X platform that Ethereum funds continued to flow in this week as investors bought on dips, reaching $740 million so far this week.
